productDisplayName: Mr. Men Men Printed Blue Sweatshirt
description: Composition Placid blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and graphic with flock print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron only, but do not iron on print Scratch your mind, tickle your fancy and dream away in glory in this long sleeve T-shirt from mr. men. Crafted from soft cotton fabric with cuts that offer a comfortable Fit, this T-shirt is sure to become a wardrobe favourite this winter. Team it with jeans and canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
